title: solena angulata
intro: Solena angulata, also known as the angled solena or wild passionflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. It is a perennial vine native to tropical Asia, traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Solena angulata include reducing stress and anxiety, relieving menstrual cramps, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Solena angulata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal effects, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
